CREATE TABLE test_table (arr Array(Int32), func String);
SELECT arrayFirst(func, arr) FROM test_table WHERE arr != [];
SELECT arrayFirst(x -> x % 2 = 0, arr) AS first_even FROM test_table WHERE arr IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arr, arrayFirst(func, arr) AS first_value FROM test_table WHERE arr[1] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arrayFirst(x -> x < 0, arr) AS negative_value FROM test_table WHERE arr[1] IS NOT NULL;
SELECT arrayFirst(func, arr) AS result FROM test_table WHERE arr = [2, 4, 6];
SELECT arrayFirst(func, arr) FROM test_table WHERE arrayFirst((x -> x > 0), arr) IS NOT NULL;
